title: Pichisermollodes nigrovenia

This family is further divided into several subfamilies, including the Cassidinae, which contains many species of tortoise beetles. Pichisermollodes nigrovenia specifically falls within the subfamily Cassidinae. The classification of Pichisermollodes nigrovenia is based on its physical characteristics and genetic makeup.
